fileNodes.name: db.js
fileNodes.summary: Configures and exports a shared PostgreSQL connection pool using either a DATABASE_URL or discrete DB_* environment variables, with connect/error event logging.

fileNodes.name: authController.js
fileNodes.summary: Express controller handling user registration and login HTTP requests, delegating business logic to authService and mapping errors to appropriate HTTP status codes.

fileNodes.name: familyController.js
fileNodes.summary: Express controller providing full CRUD operations (create, list, get, update, delete) for family records, scoped to the authenticated user.

fileNodes.name: legacyController.js
fileNodes.summary: Express controller for creating and listing legacy messages (memorial/tribute text) attached to a person.

fileNodes.name: reminderCron.js
fileNodes.summary: Daily scheduled cron job (node-cron) that queries birthdays, death anniversaries, and memory events occurring today across all families and logs mock reminder emails to the console.

fileNodes.name: errorHandler.js
fileNodes.summary: Centralized Express error-handling middleware used as the final middleware in the request pipeline to log and format error responses.

fileNodes.name: validationMiddleware.js
fileNodes.summary: Reusable Express middleware that runs express-validator's validation result check and rejects invalid requests with a 400 response.

fileNodes.name: migrate_demo.js
fileNodes.summary: Standalone Node.js script that seeds or resets the demo user's password hash directly in the database, intended to be run manually or during deployment.

fileNodes.name: familyModel.js
fileNodes.summary: Data access layer for the families table, providing parameterized SQL queries for create, read, update, and delete operations scoped to the owning user.

fileNodes.name: userModel.js
fileNodes.summary: Data access layer for the users table, providing functions to create users and look them up by email or ID.

fileNodes.name: authRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Defines the /api/auth Express routes for registration and login, wiring express-validator rules and the validation middleware to the auth controller.

fileNodes.name: familyRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Defines the /api/families Express routes for family CRUD operations, protected by the verifyToken auth middleware, plus a mock invite endpoint.

fileNodes.name: legacyRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Defines the /api/legacy Express routes for creating and listing legacy messages for a given person.

fileNodes.name: personRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Defines the /api/persons Express routes including person CRUD, search, and a multer-based photo upload endpoint with a dedicated rate limiter.

fileNodes.name: server.js
fileNodes.summary: Main Express application entry point that configures security middleware (helmet, CORS, rate limiting, sanitization), mounts all API route modules, initializes the reminder cron job, and starts the HTTP server.

fileNodes.name: authService.js
fileNodes.summary: Business logic layer for authentication: registers new users with bcrypt password hashing and validates login credentials while issuing signed JWT tokens.

fileNodes.name: familyService.js
fileNodes.summary: Thin service layer that delegates family CRUD operations to the family model, sitting between the family controller and the data access layer.

fileNodes.name: setup_demo_user.js
fileNodes.summary: Standalone Node.js script that seeds a demo user account into the database if one does not already exist.

fileNodes.name: MemoryTimeline.js
fileNodes.summary: Renders a chronologically sorted, scroll-reveal-animated timeline of memories for a person, falling back to a smart empty-state when no memories exist.

fileNodes.name: PersonNode.js
fileNodes.summary: Custom React Flow node component that renders a single person's card in the tree canvas, with generation-based color coding, avatar, lifespan, hover actions, and connection handles.

fileNodes.name: SearchBar.js
fileNodes.summary: Global debounced search input that queries persons via the API, shows a results dropdown, and navigates to the selected person's profile with keyboard and outside-click handling.

fileNodes.name: SmartSuggestions.js
fileNodes.summary: Analyzes the current tree's nodes and edges to generate dismissible, actionable suggestions such as missing relationships or incomplete profile data.

fileNodes.name: UpcomingReminders.js
fileNodes.summary: Fetches upcoming birthday and anniversary events from the API and displays them as a reminders widget.

fileNodes.name: FamilyTreePage.js
fileNodes.summary: Main workspace page that assembles the family tree canvas with the member/relationship creation forms, activity feed, insights panel, collaboration panel, search bar, and GEDCOM import, and owns tree data fetching plus create/update handlers.

fileNodes.name: PersonProfile.js
fileNodes.summary: Large person profile page combining editable fields, avatar upload, a mini tree preview, family relationship management, memory and legacy-message CRUD, privacy/sharing controls, and AI-assisted biography and story-mode generation.

fileNodes.name: familyService.js
fileNodes.summary: Service layer wrapping REST calls for families, persons, and relationships (create/read/update/delete) on top of the shared Axios API client.

fileNodes.name: api.js
fileNodes.summary: Configures the shared Axios HTTP client with a base URL, JWT bearer-token request interceptor, and a global response interceptor that standardizes error messages and redirects to login on 401 responses.

fileNodes.name: ActivityFeed.js
fileNodes.summary: Renders a live, auto-scrolling feed of recent collaboration activity events (adds, edits, invites) on the family tree workspace.

fileNodes.name: CollaborationPanel.js
fileNodes.summary: Displays the list of family tree collaborators and provides an invite-by-email form plus per-collaborator role change and removal controls.

fileNodes.name: FamilyInsightsPanel.js
fileNodes.summary: Computes aggregate statistics about the family tree (member counts, generation depth, relationship breakdown) and renders them as an animated insights dashboard panel.

fileNodes.name: FamilyInvite.js
fileNodes.summary: Standalone form component that lets a user invite a new collaborator by email and role, posting the invitation through the API client.

fileNodes.name: FamilyTimeline.js
fileNodes.summary: Fetches family-wide chronological events from the API and renders them as a vertical timeline with loading and error states.

fileNodes.name: FamilyTree.js
fileNodes.summary: Core interactive family tree visualization built on React Flow: computes a generation-based hierarchical layout (adjacency building, generation assignment, collision resolution, iterative barycenter positioning) and renders the pannable/zoomable tree canvas with focus mode, search highlighting, and PNG export.

fileNodes.name: GedcomImport.js
fileNodes.summary: Drag-and-drop and click-to-browse GEDCOM file uploader with client-side validation, upload progress tracking, and API submission for bulk family data import.

fileNodes.name: LegacySection.js
fileNodes.summary: Displays a person's legacy/memory messages and provides a composer form (title, message, emotion tag) for adding new legacy entries.

fileNodes.name: App.js
fileNodes.summary: Root React component that sets up the router, lazy-loaded route pages, global toast provider, and an online/offline network status listener.

fileNodes.name: App.test.js
fileNodes.summary: Default Create-React-App smoke test that renders the App component and checks for a 'learn react' link.

fileNodes.name: CanvasNetwork.js
fileNodes.summary: Decorative canvas component that animates a network of connected particles as an ambient background effect for auth and dashboard pages.

fileNodes.name: Footer.js
fileNodes.summary: Site-wide footer displaying the current year copyright notice, hidden on the full-screen StoryTransition route.

fileNodes.name: ToastContext.js
fileNodes.summary: React context provider implementing a global toast notification system, exposing addToast/removeToast via the useToast hook.

fileNodes.name: index.js
fileNodes.summary: Application bootstrap that mounts the root App component into the DOM, suppresses a benign ResizeObserver console error, and initiates web-vitals reporting.

fileNodes.name: Dashboard.js
fileNodes.summary: Main authenticated dashboard page listing the user's families as animated lineage cards, with create, rename, and delete family workflows.

fileNodes.name: Login.js
fileNodes.summary: Login page with an animated canvas-network background that authenticates the user against the backend and stores the returned JWT token.

fileNodes.name: Register.js
fileNodes.summary: Registration page that collects name, email, and password, submits a signup request to the backend, and redirects to login on success.

fileNodes.name: reportWebVitals.js
fileNodes.summary: Create-React-App performance reporting utility that lazily loads web-vitals and forwards CLS/FID/FCP/LCP/TTFB metrics to a callback.

fileNodes.name: components.test.js
fileNodes.summary: Integration-style tests rendering the Login, Register, and Dashboard pages inside a BrowserRouter to assert key UI text and form fields appear.

fileNodes.name: aiController.js
fileNodes.summary: Express controller handling AI-assisted biography generation for a person, orchestrating calls to person and relationship services and persisting the generated bio back to the person's profile.

fileNodes.name: personController.js
fileNodes.summary: Express controller exposing CRUD and search HTTP endpoints for person records, delegating persistence logic to personService and translating results into HTTP status codes and error responses.

fileNodes.name: relationshipController.js
fileNodes.summary: Express controller managing relationship records between family members (create, fetch, update, delete), delegating persistence to relationshipService.

fileNodes.name: personModel.js
fileNodes.summary: Data access layer for the persons table, providing parameterized SQL queries for creating, reading, updating, deleting, and searching person records.

fileNodes.name: relationshipModel.js
fileNodes.summary: Data access layer for the relationships table, providing parameterized SQL queries to create, fetch, update, and delete relationships between persons.

fileNodes.name: aiRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Express router wiring the protected AI biography generation endpoint to aiController, guarded by token verification middleware.

fileNodes.name: relationshipRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Express router defining protected CRUD endpoints for relationships, delegating to relationshipController and enforcing authentication via middleware.

fileNodes.name: personService.js
fileNodes.summary: Service layer wrapping personModel to provide business logic for person CRUD operations and name search, consumed by multiple controllers across the app.

fileNodes.name: relationshipService.js
fileNodes.summary: Service layer wrapping relationshipModel to provide business logic for creating, fetching, updating, and deleting relationships between family members.

fileNodes.name: gedcomController.js
fileNodes.summary: Express controller handling GEDCOM file import: parses the uploaded .ged file, deduplicates and inserts persons/relationships into Postgres inside a single transaction, then returns the rebuilt family tree data for the frontend.

fileNodes.name: reminderController.js
fileNodes.summary: Express controller that fetches upcoming birthdays, death anniversaries, and memory events for a family via a UNION SQL query, computes each event's next yearly occurrence, and returns those within 45 days sorted by proximity.

fileNodes.name: authMiddleware.js
fileNodes.summary: Express middleware that verifies the JWT bearer token from the Authorization header, attaches the decoded user payload to the request, and rejects unauthenticated or invalid requests.

fileNodes.name: familyTreeRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Express router exposing a protected GET endpoint that returns ReactFlow-formatted nodes/edges for a family's tree by delegating to treeBuilder.

fileNodes.name: gedcomRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Express router configuring Multer disk storage and a .ged file filter (5MB limit) for a protected GEDCOM import endpoint that delegates to gedcomController.importGedcom, with manual Multer error handling.

fileNodes.name: reminderRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Minimal Express router exposing a single protected GET endpoint that returns upcoming reminders for a family via reminderController.

fileNodes.name: gedcomParser.js
fileNodes.summary: Utility that parses raw GEDCOM file content into structured person records and spouse/parent-child relationships by walking INDI and FAM node trees.

fileNodes.name: treeBuilder.js
fileNodes.summary: Utility that queries persons and relationships for a family from Postgres and transforms them into ReactFlow-compatible nodes and edges, normalizing relationship direction into a top-down parent-to-child DAG.

fileNodes.name: eventController.js
fileNodes.summary: Controller that builds a unified, chronologically sorted family timeline by combining birth/death events derived from person records with linked memory entries.

fileNodes.name: memoryController.js
fileNodes.summary: Express controller exposing HTTP handlers for family memories — create, list by family, list by person, and delete — delegating all business logic to memoryService.

fileNodes.name: memoryModel.js
fileNodes.summary: Data access layer executing parameterized SQL queries against the memories table for create, list-by-family, list-by-person, and delete operations.

fileNodes.name: eventRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Express router wiring the protected GET /api/events endpoint to the eventController's family timeline handler.

fileNodes.name: memoryRoutes.js
fileNodes.summary: Express router defining protected CRUD endpoints (create, list by family, list by person, delete) for family memories, delegating to memoryController.

fileNodes.name: memoryService.js
fileNodes.summary: Business logic layer validating memory input (required family_id/title/person_id/memory_id) before delegating persistence operations to memoryModel.

fileNodes.name: Dockerfile
fileNodes.summary: Single-stage Docker build for the backend Node.js API, installing production dependencies on a node:18-alpine base image and starting the server with npm start on port 5001.

fileNodes.name: node
fileNodes.summary: The sole build stage, based on node:18-alpine, that copies package manifests, installs production dependencies, copies the rest of the backend source, and exposes port 5001 for the API server.

fileNodes.name: Dockerfile
fileNodes.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the React frontend: compiles the app with Node.js and serves the resulting static assets through a lightweight Nginx image.

fileNodes.name: build
fileNodes.summary: First Docker stage (node:18-alpine) that installs npm dependencies and runs `npm run build` to produce the production static assets for the frontend.

fileNodes.name: nginx
fileNodes.summary: Second Docker stage (nginx:alpine) that copies the compiled frontend assets from the build stage and serves them on port 80.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Primary project README describing the Family Tree platform's architecture (React Flow + Dagre frontend, Node.js/Express backend, PostgreSQL database), tech stack, local installation and run instructions, environment variables, REST API endpoint reference, and a production deployment guide (Supabase/Neon, Render/Railway, Vercel).

fileNodes.name: security_audit.md
fileNodes.summary: Security audit report for the Virasat.ai / Family Tree backend and frontend, cataloging 3 critical, 5 high, and 2 medium severity vulnerabilities that were found and fixed (hardcoded JWT fallback secret, wildcard CORS, leaked error messages, missing XSS sanitization, exposed Swagger UI, weak rate limiting, permissive Helmet config), plus a checklist of recommended pre-production hardening steps.

fileNodes.name: docker-compose.yml
fileNodes.summary: Docker Compose configuration that orchestrates the PostgreSQL database, Node.js backend, and React frontend as three networked services for local development and one-command containerized startup.

fileNodes.name: database
fileNodes.summary: PostgreSQL 15 database service storing the family tree relational data, exposing port 5432 and persisting data via the pgdata named volume.

fileNodes.name: backend
fileNodes.summary: Node.js/Express backend service built from the ./backend directory, exposing port 5001 and configured via environment variables for DB connection and JWT secret; depends on the database service being available.

fileNodes.name: frontend
fileNodes.summary: React frontend service built from the ./frontend directory, served on host port 3000 (mapped to container port 80); depends on the backend service.

fileNodes.name: .env
fileNodes.summary: Backend runtime environment file supplying the server port, PostgreSQL connection credentials, JWT signing secret, and allowed CORS origins for the Express server in production mode.

fileNodes.name: .env.example
fileNodes.summary: Template environment file documenting the variables required to run the Virasat.ai family tree backend (server port, PostgreSQL connection, JWT secret, CORS origins) with placeholder values and setup instructions.

fileNodes.name: package.json
fileNodes.summary: Node.js package manifest for the Family Tree Express backend, declaring core dependencies (Express, pg, jsonwebtoken, bcryptjs, multer, gedcom, node-cron, helmet, cors) and npm scripts for starting the server in development and production.

fileNodes.name: users
fileNodes.summary: Stores registered application user accounts with hashed passwords, used for authentication and as the owner reference for created families.

fileNodes.name: families
fileNodes.summary: Represents a family unit created by a user, acting as the top-level grouping for persons, memories, and the overall family tree.

fileNodes.name: persons
fileNodes.summary: Core entity table storing individual family members with biographical details (name, gender, birth/death dates, birth place, occupation, bio, photo) scoped to a family.

fileNodes.name: relationships
fileNodes.summary: Junction table linking two persons via a typed relationship (e.g. parent, spouse), with a check constraint preventing a person from being related to themselves.

fileNodes.name: memories
fileNodes.summary: Stores memory and timeline entries (title, description, media, event date) linked to a person and family, powering the member memory timeline feature.

fileNodes.name: legacy_messages
fileNodes.summary: Stores legacy/heritage messages authored for a person, optionally tagged with an emotion and referencing associated memory records via an array of memory IDs.

fileNodes.name: swagger.yaml
fileNodes.summary: OpenAPI 3.0 specification documenting the Family Tree REST API, covering authentication, family and person management, relationships, GEDCOM import, and family-tree visualization endpoints, served via swagger-ui-express.

fileNodes.name: POST /api/auth/register
fileNodes.summary: Registers a new user account with name, email, and password; returns 201 on success.

fileNodes.name: POST /api/auth/login
fileNodes.summary: Authenticates a user with email and password credentials, returning a success response used to establish an authenticated session.

fileNodes.name: GET /api/families
fileNodes.summary: Retrieves the list of families belonging to the authenticated user.

fileNodes.name: POST /api/families
fileNodes.summary: Creates a new family record with a family name for the authenticated user.

fileNodes.name: GET /api/family-tree/{family_id}
fileNodes.summary: Returns the family tree structure as nodes and edges formatted for rendering with React Flow.

fileNodes.name: POST /api/persons
fileNodes.summary: Adds a new family member (person) with name, gender, and birth place details to a family.

fileNodes.name: POST /api/relationships
fileNodes.summary: Creates a relationship link between two family members with a specified relationship type (e.g. parent).

fileNodes.name: POST /api/gedcom/import
fileNodes.summary: Imports an uploaded GEDCOM genealogy file and converts it into family tree nodes and edges.

fileNodes.name: vercel.json
fileNodes.summary: Vercel deployment configuration that builds the Express server.js entry point as a serverless function and routes all incoming requests to it.

fileNodes.name: .env.example
fileNodes.summary: Template environment file for the React frontend, declaring the REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL variable used to point the client at the backend API.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Standard Create React App documentation covering available npm scripts (start, test, build, eject), code splitting, bundle analysis, PWA setup, and deployment guidance.

fileNodes.name: package.json
fileNodes.summary: NPM manifest for the React frontend, declaring dependencies (React 19, React Router, ReactFlow, Dagre, elkjs, axios, Tailwind CSS, html-to-image) and Create React App scripts for the family tree visualization client.

fileNodes.name: index.html
fileNodes.summary: HTML entry template for the Create React App-based frontend; mounts the React app into a #root div, sets Virasat.ai branding/meta tags and description, links the PWA manifest and favicon, and includes a Google Analytics boilerplate script with a placeholder tracking ID.

fileNodes.name: manifest.json
fileNodes.summary: Progressive Web App manifest defining installable app metadata (icons, start URL, display mode, theme/background colors) for the frontend; still contains the default unmodified Create React App boilerplate values.

fileNodes.name: robots.txt
fileNodes.summary: Robots exclusion file for the frontend static site that permits all web crawlers unrestricted access (no Disallow rules).

fileNodes.name: .DS_Store
fileNodes.summary: macOS Finder metadata file that stores folder view settings and icon positions; not part of the application source and carries no functional logic.

fileNodes.name: .understandignore
fileNodes.summary: Ignore-pattern configuration for the Understand-Anything analysis tool, listing commented-out gitignore-style globs (test files, generated code, per-language exclusions) that can be uncommented to exclude paths from the knowledge graph scan.

fileNodes.name: init_cloud_db.js
fileNodes.summary: Standalone CLI script that connects to an external/cloud PostgreSQL database via a connection string argument and applies schema.sql to bootstrap the production database (e.g., for a Vercel deployment).

fileNodes.name: init_db.js
fileNodes.summary: Local development setup script that creates the family_tree PostgreSQL database if it does not already exist, then connects to it and applies schema.sql to build the schema.

fileNodes.name: integration.test.js
fileNodes.summary: End-to-end integration test suite that exercises the live backend API over HTTP (register, login, create family, add person, create relationship) using supertest against a running local server.

fileNodes.name: postcss.config.js
fileNodes.summary: PostCSS build configuration enabling the tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins for the frontend's CSS pipeline.

fileNodes.name: App.css
fileNodes.summary: Legacy Create React App boilerplate stylesheet defining the .App container, header, logo spin animation, and link styling.

fileNodes.name: index.css
fileNodes.summary: Global stylesheet that loads Tailwind's base, components, and utilities layers and sets base body/code font families for the app.

fileNodes.name: StoryTransition.js
fileNodes.summary: Full-screen cinematic transition page that staggers two fading text lines over timed intervals before auto-navigating to the demo family tree view.

fileNodes.name: setupTests.js
fileNodes.summary: Jest test environment setup file that imports @testing-library/jest-dom to enable custom DOM matchers for the frontend test suite.

fileNodes.name: tailwind.config.js
fileNodes.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration scanning all JS/JSX/TS/TSX files under src for class usage, with an empty theme extension and no additional plugins.
